caption: The video features a man dressed in traditional attire, including a white shirt and a black vest adorned with intricate blue embroidery and a red and black pendant. He is seated and playing an acoustic guitar while singing into a microphone. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds visible in the background, suggesting a formal or semi-formal event. The audience, partially visible in the foreground, seems engaged as they listen attentively. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, possibly indicating the organization or event name. The man's performance exudes a sense of cultural significance and musical expression.
